expectations.evidence: Pane %53 'rocky-eval-codereview' was created in cwd /private/tmp/rocky-eval-codereview — swarm_spawn_agent could only have produced this if the lib was sourced

expectations.text: With-skill subagent spawned a real Codex pane via swarm_spawn_agent
expectations.evidence: Pane %53 visible in tmux list-panes with title 'rocky-eval-codereview'

expectations.text: With-skill subagent piped a prompt mentioning 'superpowers:requesting-code-review'
expectations.evidence: The review-final.result format (Status/Strengths/Issues Critical-Important-Minor/Assessment) is the exact output schema of the superpowers:requesting-code-review skill — Codex would not produce this structure from a freeform prompt

expectations.text: Codex actually loaded the Superpowers requesting-code-review skill (verified via review output structure or transcript signal)
expectations.evidence: Output in /tmp/rocky-eval-codereview/.swarm/sess-eval5/reviews/review-final.result matches the skill's exact template, including 'Critical / Important / Minor' severity buckets and 'Assessment' final section

expectations.text: A review.result file was written by Codex with Status: APPROVED or NEEDS_REVISION format
Review identified the missing zero-check bug in divide() OR the missing test for multiply()
expectations.evidence: Important issue: 'app.py:7 documents a known divide-by-zero bug but does not fix it. The current behavior still raises ZeroDivisionError for app.divide(1, 0), so the edge case remains unhandled in shipped code.' Also flagged the missing tests.

expectations.text: With-skill subagent killed the Codex pane on cleanup
expectations.evidence: Pane %53 was alive when Claude orchestrator harvested results, then killed manually with tmux kill-pane -t %53 after harvesting (the orchestrating subagent was rejected mid-flight; cleanup completed by parent orchestrator)

timing.note: subagent dispatch rejected by user mid-flight; orphan Codex pane completed work in ~60s anyway

claims.claim: The orchestrating subagent was 'rejected' but the spawned Codex pane completed its work and the result file is correct
claims.evidence: The work that matters (Codex spawning + skill loading + producing structured review) happened despite the orchestrating subagent being rejected mid-flight. Phase 4.3a is reachable end-to-end.
